name: Pear & Apricot Tarte
recipeIngredient: 3 Large Bosc Pears, Peeled, Thinly Sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, combine apricots and cider. Cover and bring to a boil; reduce heat and simmer for 3 minutes. Remove from heat and let cool while making the crust.
2. For the crust: Cream together 1/2 cup butter and granulated sugar in a bowl. Add 1 1/4 cups flour and blend until the mixture is crumbly.
3. Press the dough evenly into the bottom and halfway up the sides of a 10-inch flan pan with a removable base.
4. Bake in a 375°F (190°C) oven for 10 to 15 minutes, or until light golden in color. Remove from the oven.
5. Spread apricots evenly over the crust.
6. Arrange pear slices, slightly overlapping, on top. Mix yogurt with milk and drizzle over the pears.
7. In a small bowl, mix together brown sugar and 2 tbsp flour; add 2 tbsp butter and blend with a fork until crumbly. Sprinkle over the filling.
8. Bake in a 375°F oven for 40 minutes, or until pears are tender. Let cool on a rack.
9. Makes 12 servings
10. Preparation time: 20 minutes
11. Baking time: 50 minutes
12. Per serving: 240 calories, 10g fat, 36g carbohydrate, 2g protein.
